title: epidendrum citroserpens
intro: Epidendrum citroserpens, also known as the Lemon-scented Dendrobium, is a type of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Epidendrum citroserpens include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory tract infections. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
